title: Stargazers Adventure Club
schedule: For children aged 4-8 and their people
description: Blast off with Stargazers Adventure Club in Planetary Games, an interactive space spectacular where imagination fuels the fun! You’ll learn planetary facts from out-of-this-world host, Astro the Alien as the Stargazers “bubble port” across all eight planets. This family friendly adventure is packed with music, movement, comedy and audience participation. In Stargazers Adventure Club: Planetary Games, everyone who has fun is a winner! 🚀 🪐 💫

title: Rising Stars Burlesque Revue
description:
Come see Chicago's hottest up-and-coming burlesque stars! Experience the next generation of spectacle at Rising Stars, an alluring burlesque and variety revue that honors the Windy City's storied legacy of live entertainment. This high-energy showcase brings together the city's most captivating emerging burlesque dancers and variety entertainment for a night full of fun, whimsy, humor, and seduction. Whether you're a long-time fan of burlesque or a curious newcomer, we invite you to come enjoy Stars & Garters' intimate venue, world-class cocktails, and unforgettable performance artists.

Every Rising Stars show features a unique roster of talent, so there's reason to come back again and again. (Follow @starsandgarterstheater on instagram to see when your favorite performers are scheduled for a show.)

title: Starlets Presents
description: Chicago's premiere burlesque showcase featuring performances by the city's finest performers.

title: Laugh-Along, Live!
description: Laugh-Along, Live! is a comedy show, movie screening, and party wrapped in one. Three comedians make jokes throughout a film (à la Mystery Science Theater) and run activities for the audience. Audience participation is encouraged, as our shows often include drinking games, costume contests, trivia quizzes, dance-offs, and more.

title: FreakShow & Tell
description:
21+ ONLY

Brianna Wellen, Chicago Reader:

"Sideshow entertainer Thom Britton’s solo show is part performance, part demonstration. Britton is a charismatic performer who appears genuinely thrilled to share how simple his seemingly death-defying acts really are. His explanations are peppered with jokes and carnival flair, making even the dullest details memorable and entertaining. I may have retained more information about science and history during a single carnival-themed night than in all my years of schooling"

Sideshow performer Thom Britton created a stage show to answer the barrage of questions he regularly received before, during, and after his performances.

People wanted to know how he could possibly eat fire or drive a nail into his head or why he'd want to walk on broken glass or stand on an electrified plate. Thus was born "FreakShow & Tell," an hour and fifteen-minute long stage show that fuses science, history, anatomy, physics, and a whole slew of others with genuine sideshow acts such as The Electric Man, Fire Eating and Glass Walking, amongst other things.

The show is funny, poignant, entertaining, fast-paced, and 100% science!

title: M.A.S.T.E.R.M.I.N.D.S.
description:
Calling all evil-doers, charlatans, and ne'er-do-wells! Come participate in a board meeting for villains!

See slideshows of nefarious plans presented by 4 nefarious villains!

All facilitated by the powerful chairperson of the board, MindMaster (Gib Christensen)

M.A.S.T.E.R.M.I.N.D.S. (Menaces Assessing Strategic Tactics End Rogues Making Intelligent Maneuvers Diabolically Shhh) is a slide presentation comedy show that involves audience participation, so come prepared to get villainous with us! Every month we have a different set of villains. Follow us @mastermindschicago on instagram for info on future shows.

title: Chicago's Workshop Mic
description: Up and coming Chicago stand up comedians workshop new material and sign up for 10 minute sets at the Chicago Comedy Hour!

title: DK's Full Five Fridays
description: 10 of Chicago's best up and coming comedians for only $10

title: Short-form Improv Coached Jam
description:
Come learn and play improv games with the cast of Comedy Pageant.

All experience levels welcome

title: The Re:Up - A Monthly Comedy Show
description: A monthly comedy show featuring Sam Rossi, Bronwyn Galloway, Xavier Smith, Mark Weitekamper, and Ryan Kruger

title: A Witty Ditty Committee Presents: Paddy's Parade Panel
description: An improvised musical comedy experience starring B-Sticky and Ross Childs.

title: The Real Spacewives of Alderaan
description: The Real Spacewives of Alderaan is a fully improvised reality show adventure across the galaxy. Honoring the tropes of both Bravo TV and Star Wars, our show revolves around the wealthy elite women of the luxurious Alderaan system. Our all-femme cast of spacewives and host Andi-Wan Cohnobi create a hilarious, unscripted episode of reality TV featuring fierce rivalries, out-of-this-world fashion, and enough chaos to rival a galactic civil war.

title: Down & Down Presents: A Stand-Up Comedy Show
description: The very best comics in Chicago & Beyond take the stage for one night only.

title: Burly-oke!
description:
Get ready to trade your shower-singing sessions for the spotlight at Burly-oke!, the ultimate mashup of karaoke and burlesque! From 8:00 PM to 11:00 PM, we're turning the stage over to you...and the incredible burlesque performers of Stars & Garters.

Pop-Up Karaoke will be in the house providing their signature, best-in-Chicago, karaoke experience. While you croon a ballad, belt a rock anthem, or sing a pop bop, our professional burlesque performers will be right there with you delivering improvised, show-stopping dances every few songs. Feel free to drop in for a song, or stay for the full three-hour spectacle.

While there is no cover charge to join the fun, we do require a two-item minimum purchase and tipping the dancers and KJ is encouraged.

If you want to elevate your evening, grab a VIP table to secure the best view in the house with front-row seating and a special gift. The best part? VIP guests are guaranteed that at least one of their karaoke selections will feature a live burlesque dancer performing alongside them.

Come see the magic one-night only: April 1st. Gather your friends, warm-up your vocal chords, and get ready for a karaoke night like no other.

title: Date Night: Live
description:
First dates are awkward enough… let's put them on stage!

On this evening, at the romantic Stars & Garters, two singles will meet for the first time. Watch them fall in love… unless they don't! 3 rounds, 2 singles, 1 epic first date.

title: The Gap: Stand-up Showcase
description:
Featuring:
Colton Alstatt
Emmanuel J. Ross Hartway
Michael Oakes
Thom Murray
Trevor D. Kelley

title: A Random Memory
description:
A Random Memory is an intimate magic and mentalism show worth remembering. Every trick uses the audience's own cares, wishes and memories to create magic with emotional weight. Instead of another round of generic card tricks featuring kings and aces, the show opens with a nearly blank deck of cards and each trick fills out more of the deck with things the audience cares about. To bring things full circle and remind us all that even this show will only be a memory, the audience performs a magic trick of their own that destroys the deck they spent the last hour building.

A Random Memory is the brainchild of magician, Dan Feltey. Dan is a software engineer by trade who fell in love with magic in 2018 and never gave it up. Dan got his start in magic taking classes at Magic Inc., and The Chicago Magic Lounge, before joining Open Heart Magic in 2023 as a bedside magician. Open Heart Magic is a non-profit organization that trains volunteers to perform magic at children's hospitals throughout the midwest, and emphasizes magic that makes the child the center of every trick. Dan brings this philosophy to A Random Memory, allowing the audience to become the star of the show and experience the magic themselves.
